authority: Official Misfit Shapes model descriptions and governed Quivrr catalogue records

models.reason: Classic speed-egg platform with glide, paddle and longer rail line as the defining identity.
Modern twin-fin all-rounder with progressive everyday use as the primary role.
Misfit positions it as a contemporary, lively performance twin rather than a general hybrid.
Round-tail performance-twin variant aimed at added control and hold in stronger surf.
High-output all-round shortboard combining power, clean lines and broad usability.
Fun-board and progressive shortboard blend with broad everyday intent.
Signature performance model built around aggressive, modern surfing rather than forgiving daily use.
Refined signature twin designed around speed, drive and progressive performance.
Power-oriented signature shortboard with performance intent as the governing role.
Extended Beach Cloud concept with mid-length glide and twin-fin flow as the primary identity.
Shorter and livelier twin-fin speed-egg variant that remains fundamentally a mid-length design.
Fast, accessible all-round shortboard designed to create speed and maintain flow in everyday surf.

review_notes: Beach Metall variants were moved out of the broad Daily Driver lane because Misfit explicitly presents them as performance twins.
DRIB, Eraser Head and Fungzetti are governed by signature performance intent rather than the previous generic hybrid fallback.
The speed-egg and Longus models remain Mid Length because rail line, glide and paddle identity dominate their behaviour.
